---
subtitle: "Darwin Fish Consumption"
filters:
  - sorting-hat
  - ripper
extensions:
  sorting-hat:
    keep:
      - r
    verbose: true
  # ripper:
  #   include-yaml: false
  #   output-dir: "../pipeline"
  #   output-name: "01_mah_a_load_data"
  #   script-links-position: "none"
format: gfm
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
dar_hh_fish_with_grams_no_weekly <- tibble()
```
